2604.07182.title: TeaLeafVision: An Explainable and Robust Deep Learning Framework for Tea Leaf Disease Classification
2604.07182.paper_summary: As the worlds second most consumed beverage after water, tea is not just a cultural staple but a global economic force of profound scale and influence. More than a mere drink, it represents a quiet negotiation between nature, culture, and the human desire for a moment of reflection. So, the precise identification and detection of tea leaf disease is crucial. With this goal, we have evaluated several Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) models, among them three shows noticeable performance including DenseNet201, MobileNetV2, InceptionV3 on the teaLeafBD dataset. teaLeafBD dataset contains seven classes, six disease classes and one healthy class, collected under various field conditions reflecting real world challenges. Among the CNN models, DenseNet201 has achieved the highest test accuracy of 99%. In order to enhance the model reliability and interpretability, we have implemented Gradient weighted Class Activation Mapping (Grad CAM), occlusion sensitivity analysis and adversarial training techniques to increase the noise resistance of the model. Finally, we have developed a prototype in order to leverage the models capabilities on real life agriculture. This paper illustrates the deep learning models capabilities to classify the disease in real life tea leaf disease detection and management.
2604.07182.paper_summary_zh: 作為全球第二大消耗的飲料，僅次於水，茶不僅是文化的基石，更是一種具有深遠規模和影響力的全球經濟力量。茶不僅僅是一種飲品，它代表了自然、文化和人類對反思時刻的渴望之間的靜默協商。因此，精確識別和檢測茶葉疾病至關重要。為了達成這一目標，我們評估了幾個卷積神經網絡（CNN）模型，其中三個模型在teaLeafBD數據集上顯示出顯著的性能，包括DenseNet201、MobileNetV2和InceptionV3。teaLeafBD數據集包含七個類別，六個疾病類別和一個健康類別，這些數據是在反映現實世界挑戰的各種田間條件下收集的。在這些CNN模型中，DenseNet201達到了99%的最高測試準確率。為了增強模型的可靠性和可解釋性，我們實施了梯度加權類別激活映射（Grad CAM）、遮擋敏感性分析和對抗訓練技術，以提高模型的抗噪聲能力。最後，我們開發了一個原型，以利用模型在現實農業中的能力。本文展示了深度學習模型在現實茶葉疾病檢測和管理中的疾病分類能力。
2604.07182.author: Rafi Ahamed et.al.
2604.07182.authors: Rafi Ahamed, Sidratul Moon Nafsin, Md Abir Rahman, Tasnia Tarannum Roza, Munaia Jannat Easha, Abu Raihan
